race.comment: OCEAN TSUNAMI (1) was beaten a neck by today's chief rival MAPLES last start over this course and distance. Followed that runner into the race then went via the cape on the bend whereas the winner stayed inside. Enjoys a 1.5 kg weight swing and with even luck in running should turn the tables. MAPLES (4) started favourite and made it two victories from as many starts when successful here at this trip last time. It gets harder now but she is difficult to knock. THE CRISTAL (3) started favourite but after seeming to have every chance in the run failed to finish off over 1400m at Newcastle recently. Might be looking for this trip third up so she deserves another chance. HINUNE (5) was scratched from a winnable race at Taree on Thursday to be saved for this. Impressive when successful over 1500m at Goulburn last time. Hit the line as though an extra 200m will be no problem. YORIKIRI (8) was poor over 2000m at Taree last start but is worth another chance back to this trip.
